task_completion.description: The AndroidManifest.xml file is updated to include the CAMERA permission.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing AndroidManifest.xml open in an editor or terminal with the line `<uses-permission android:name="android.permission.CAMERA" />` added.

task_completion.description: MainActivity.kt uses ActivityResultContracts.RequestPermission to register for the permission result.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing MainActivity.kt with code utilizing `registerForActivityResult(ActivityResultContracts.RequestPermission())`.

task_completion.description: MainActivity.kt checks if the CAMERA permission is already granted before opening the camera.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing MainActivity.kt with a call to `checkSelfPermission` (e.g., `ContextCompat.checkSelfPermission`) checking for `Manifest.permission.CAMERA`.

task_completion.description: MainActivity.kt initiates the permission request if the permission is not yet granted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing MainActivity.kt calling `.launch(Manifest.permission.CAMERA)` on the registered permission launcher.

task_completion.description: The app compiles successfully after the changes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing a successful Gradle build output (e.g., 'BUILD SUCCESSFUL' in the terminal or Android Studio Build tool window) for the QuickSnap project.

integrity.description: The agent actually modified the project files rather than just printing the expected code.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent editing AndroidManifest.xml and MainActivity.kt in a text editor or IDE (like Android Studio, nano, vim), not just echoing the code to the terminal.

integrity.description: The build success message is from a genuine Gradle execution.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the actual Gradle build process running (e.g., `./gradlew build` or Android Studio build) rather than a mocked script or echo command printing 'BUILD SUCCESSFUL'.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the task by hardcoding a fake camera open success.
integrity.visual_evidence: The code in MainActivity.kt genuinely implements the permission logic rather than just printing a success message or bypassing the camera intent.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The project is located at /home/ga/AndroidStudioProjects/QuickSnap. The manifest file is at app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml and must contain the CAMERA permission. The main activity is at app/src/main/java/com/example/quicksnap/MainActivity.kt and must use ActivityResultContracts.RequestPermission, registerForActivityResult, and checkSelfPermission. The build must succeed using Gradle.
